name: Paratus Health
long_description: We're the first GTM data platform built for selling into healthcare. If you sell to clinics, hospitals, or providers, you know the problem: public healthcare data is messy, contacts go stale fast, and reps burn hours on lists that bounce. We clean it, enrich it with live web data, and layer on buying signals that surface which practices are actually in pain and ready to buy - so you get accurate, ready-to-call lists without building your own data team. And we're just getting started: more data sources, more signals, and deeper coverage are shipping fast. Want to see it on your ICP? Reach out and we'll pull you a sample list.
one_liner: The first healthcare GTM data platform
